articles.description: Earlier this month, Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei – the second son of slain Ayatollah Ali Khamenei – was elected as Iran's new supreme leader. At that time, reports mentioned that the decision was allegedly taken under pressure from the Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC)

articles.title: No talks with Vijay’s party so far by AIADMK or its allies: Palaniswami

topStories.title: Trump says US may hit Iran’s Kharg Island again ‘just for fun’ - Al Jazeera
topStories.description: Trump says US may hit Iran’s Kharg Island again ‘just for fun’  Al Jazeera

topStories.title: U.S. attitude to the Kurdish question reflects colonial mindset, says Nilufer Koc
topStories.description: Spokesperson of Kurdistan National Congress says the U.S. made the proposal about Kurdish fighters without broader consultation with the Kurds

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: Trump's appeal to allies to send ships to reopen Hormuz brings no promises yet
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump urges allies to send warships to keep the Strait of Hormuz open amid the US-Israel war in Iran. However, no commitments have been made so far. Iran’s IRGC closed the Strait, raising oil to $120/barrel. IEA to release 400 million barrels from emergency stockpiles

topStories.title: Iran wants deal to end war? Abbas Araghchi pushes back on Trump claims, says ‘never asked for ceasefire’
topStories.description: This week, US President Donald Trump said Iran wanted a deal, but that he was not prepared to make one on current terms, without giving further details. Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi reacted to the President's claim.

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: IEA says over 400 million barrels of emergency oil to start flowing soon amid tensions
topStories.description: The IEA is releasing 400 million barrels of emergency oil to global markets as the US-Israel conflict with Iran disrupts supplies. Member countries in the Americas, Asia Oceania, and Europe will provide government and industry stocks. The move aims to calm markets after crude hit $120/barrel.

topStories.title: Wild US Weather Halts Flights, Dumps Snow and Knocks Out Power
topStories.description: Blizzards, wildfires and thunderstorms are swirling toward the eastern US having knocked out power to thousands and grounded hundreds of flights across the Midwest.

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: Tucker Carlson claims CIA read his texts with Iran to frame him as foreign agent
topStories.description: Former Fox News host Tucker Carlson claims the CIA read his texts and recommended DOJ charges accusing him of acting as an unregistered agent for Iran. Carlson denies the allegation, calling the case politically motivated and saying speaking to foreign sources is part of his work as a commentator.

topStories.title: DNT leaders move Supreme Court seeking distinct enumeration in 2027 Census
topStories.description: Petition seeks specific question on Denotified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes in houselisting and population enumeration phases of the 2027 Census

topStories.title: Illegal immigrant released under Biden charged with groping female students at Virginia high school
topStories.description: Mother of three students speaks out about alleged sexual assault case at Virginia high school, criticizing delayed notification and school district policies.

topStories.title: CarGurus breach linked to ShinyHunters exposes 12.4M records
topStories.description: CarGurus users face a security risk after the ShinyHunters hacking group allegedly leaked 12.4 million records containing names, addresses and finance data.

topStories.title: Oprah Winfrey fires back at internet trolls mocking her '90-year-old' walk at Paris Fashion Week
topStories.description: Oprah Winfrey hilariously explains why she appeared to walk slowly at Paris Fashion Week, revealing she couldn't see through non-prescription sunglasses.

dailyNews.title: Tori Spelling sets the record straight on 30 years of plastic surgery rumors
dailyNews.description: Tori Spelling opens up about devastating plastic surgery rumors that started when she was just 17 on "90210" and continue to hurt her feelings at 52.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair Brendan Carr warns broadcasters must 'correct course' on 'news distortions' before license renewals
dailyNews.description: FCC chair Brendan Carr warned broadcasters running "fake news" could lose licenses during renewals, citing public interest requirements and media accountability.

dailyNews.title: String of attacks connected to naturalized citizens raises national security questions
dailyNews.description: Four alleged terror attacks connected naturalized U.S. citizens in March expose critical security gaps in America, a security expert warned on Fox News.

dailyNews.title: Iran arrests dozens accused of spying for Israel in new internal crackdown
dailyNews.description: Iran says it has arrested dozens of alleged spies linked to Israel across several provinces, accusing them of sharing the locations of military sites and economic infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Rihanna shooting suspect’s disturbing posts emerge as star joins growing celebrity list facing fan threats
dailyNews.description: Unwelcome visitors for celebrities reach a dangerous new level as Rihanna joins a list of stars like Taylor Swift and Ariana Grande facing obsessed fans and attackers.

dailyNews.title: Common vitamin could bring relief from long COVID symptoms, study suggests
dailyNews.description: New study reveals vitamin D supplements may reduce long COVID risk by 4%. Promising results for symptoms like fatigue and brain fog in clinical trial.

dailyNews.title: DAVID MARCUS: In an age of broken institutions, the filibuster is one relic we can't afford
dailyNews.description: Senate filibuster allegedly enables far-left institutional capture of American democracy, argues detailed analysis comparing modern politics to England's history.

dailyNews.title: Prince William honors Princess Diana with never-before-seen childhood photo on UK Mother's Day tribute
dailyNews.description: Prince William shared a Mother's Day tribute to Princess Diana with rare childhood photo, remembering his mother who died when he was 15.

dailyNews.title: Ex-NFL star Troy Aikman drops theory about cause of early season injuries
dailyNews.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer Troy Aikman theorized the reason why early season injuries occur often in the NFL and suggested it had something to do with the rules.

dailyNews.title: US could take Iran’s main oil export hub ‘at a time of our choosing,’ Jack Keane says
dailyNews.description: Retired Gen. Jack Keane warns U.S. could seize Iran's critical Kharg Island oil hub "at a time of our choosing," potentially crippling Tehran's economy.

dailyNews.title: Top California librarian questioned about missing $650K tied to Dolly Parton child literacy program
dailyNews.description: California’s state librarian faces scrutiny after lawmakers said about $650,000 connected to a Dolly Parton Imagination Library literacy program cannot be accounted for.

dailyNews.title: Mamdani defends wife when confronted on work with anti-Israel author, decries rhetoric
dailyNews.description: Mayor Mamdani defended his wife after she allegedly worked with author who called the Oct. 7 Hamas attacks "spectacular" and Jewish Israelis "rootless ghouls," though decrying the rhetoric.

topStories.title: Latino voters are 'no longer sleeping,' Univision president warns GOP, Dems
topStories.description: Televisa Univision president calls Latino voters a "sleeping giant that is no longer sleeping," urging parties to revamp their approach for 2026.

topStories.title: Entering War’s Third Week, Trump Faces Stark Choices
topStories.description: As the conflict with Iran expands and intensifies, President Trump’s options — to fight on, or to move toward declaring victory and pulling back — both carry deeply problematic consequences.

topStories.title: After Trump’s Call to Send Warships to Strait of Hormuz, Nations Respond With Caution
topStories.description: President Trump has urged China, Britain, France, Japan and South Korea to send warships to help reopen the waterway, even though they were not involved in the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran.

topStories.title: Markwayne Mullin, Trump’s Homeland Security Pick, Got Wealthier Stock Trading in Congress
topStories.description: Markwayne Mullin’s financial dealings take on new importance as the Senate considers his nomination to lead an agency whose budget has vastly expanded.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Turns to Migrant Workers to Help Farm Labor Shortage
topStories.description: As the president’s immigration policies squeeze an already tight supply of farm labor, the Trump administration is making it cheaper to hire foreign farmworkers.

topStories.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
topStories.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

topStories.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr says broadcast licenses are not a "property right"
topStories.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

topStories.title: Trump economic adviser Kevin Hassett says of Iran war funding: "Right now, we've got what need"
topStories.description: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that so far, the war with Iran has cost $12 billion, adding that "right now, we've got what we need" on funding as lawmakers are preparing for a possible supplemental funding request from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options to strike Iran's critical oil hub, UN Ambassador Waltz says
dailyNews.description: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
dailyNews.description: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire but he's not ready to make a deal
dailyNews.description: In a wide-ranging interview, President Donald Trump said he’s not ready to make a deal to end the war with Iran, despite Iran’s willingness to do so.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Appointee wants to replace White House columns with the ones Trump prefers
dailyNews.description: The head of a federal arts commission is proposing the more ornate Corinthian style for the nearly 200-year-old columns at the building’s front entrance.

dailyNews.title: Trump is eager to declare victory, but a battered Iran still has cards to play
dailyNews.description: The U.S. and Israel crippled Iranian forces in two weeks of war, but Tehran’s ability to disrupt oil flows and its uranium stockpile complicate the push to end it.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges world to help open Strait of Hormuz; U.S. Embassy in Baghdad hit
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon identified the six service members who were killed when a U.S. refueling aircraft crashed in Iraq while supporting operations in Iran.
